name: Zalo Mod
description: Zero-token Zalo group moderation — slash commands, anti-spam, warn system, memory integration. Blocks LLM for non-mention messages.

groupNames.description: Map groupId → display name. Tự động cập nhật từ sessions. VD: {"123456": "Nhóm ABC"}

adminIds.description: Zalo user IDs allowed to use admin commands (/canh-cao, /bao-cao, /cau-hinh, /luu-tru). If empty, all users can use admin commands.

botName.description: Bot display name in menus and guides. Default: 'Bot'

zaloDisplayNames.description: Zalo display name aliases for @mention detection. e.g. ['Minh Tuan', 'William']

welcomeEnabled.description: Enable welcome message for new members. Default: true

spamRepeatN.description: Number of repeated messages in the time window to trigger spam detection. Default: 3

spamWindowSeconds.description: Time window in seconds for spam repeat detection. Default: 300

memoryGroupSlug.description: Override the memory folder name. Auto-generated from first entry in groupNames if not set.

watchGroupIds.description: Zalo group IDs to watch for new members. Required for welcome messages since zalouser channel does not expose join events.

welcomePollSeconds.description: Polling interval in seconds for member watcher. Min 15. Default: 30

ownerId.description: Zalo user ID của chủ nhân bot. Có quyền cấu hình mọi thứ qua DM riêng.

allowedDmUsers.description: Danh sách Zalo user IDs được phép DM với bot. Nếu để trống, tất cả đều có thể DM. Owner luôn được phép.
